---
name: "🚀 Feature Request"
about: Suggest an idea or a new feature for the Axiom prompt optimization suite.
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. E.g., "I'm frustrated when I want to use a specific engineering mode on my macOS HUD but..."

**Describe the Solution You'd Like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Add any design suggestions (e.g. key triggers, popup tabs layout, etc.).

**Describe Alternatives You've Considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

**Technical Feasibility / Execution context**
If you have looked at how this would be implemented in `content.js` or Swift classes, add details here to speed up integration.

**Additional Context**
Add any other context, designs, or mockups about the feature request here.
